mapper.insert: insert into feed_reply ( feed_id, username, reply_content, deleted, parents_reply_id ) values( #{feedId}, #{username}, #{replyContent}, #{deleted}, #{parentsReplyId} )
mapper.select: select m.nickname, fr.reply_content,fr.reply_id,fr.parents_reply_id from feed_reply fr join member m on fr.username = m.username where fr.feed_id=#{feedId} and fr.deleted=0 and m.deleted=0 order by fr.reply_id asc
select m.nickname, fr.reply_content,fr.reply_id from feed_reply fr join member m on fr.username = m.username where fr.feed_id=#{feedId} and fr.deleted=0 and m.deleted=0 order by fr.reply_id asc
